# qbitOS mu.eee — llms.txt

> https://github.com/qbitOS/mu.eee

## Summary

**mu.eee** documents the **μ'search** shell: a single-page host (`mueee.html`) with a universal prompt bar, Tonnetz spine navigation, and stacked iframes for Search, History, pad, kbatch, hexcast, throughline, games, globe, uvqbit, Core Race, Gridlock, Notes. **BroadcastChannel** `mueee-throughline` syncs spine state across embedded apps.

## Key files (upstream)

- uvspeed `web/mueee.html` — shell (generated by `scripts/build_mueee.py`)
- uvspeed `web/mueee-throughline-spine.js` — spine ORDER + labels
- COMPLIANCE.qmd — org baseline (this repo)

## Upstream code

https://github.com/qbitOS/uvspeed
